name: 15q24_microdeletion_BP1_BP4
description: 15q24 recurrent microdeletion / microduplication syndrome — ~1.7-6.1 Mb CNVs flanked by direct-orientation SD blocks (BP1, BP2, BP3, BP4, BP5) at >95% identity. Five recurrent breakpoint clusters produce nested CNVs. Phenotype: ID, growth retardation, distinct facies (high anterior hairline, hypertelorism), microcephaly, genitourinary anomalies. Critical genes likely include SEMA7A, CYP11A1, STRA6.

architecture.internal_structure: Five 15q24 LCR blocks of ~50-200 kb at >95% identity (GOLGA8/HERC2 paralog cassettes shared with 15q11-q13 region); unique core contains SEMA7A, CYP11A1, STRA6, CSK, CPLX3, ULK3, ARID3B.

related_diseases: 15q24 microdeletion syndrome (ID, growth retardation, GU anomalies)
